creator: nobutaka@nobutaka.com
text:
Add w3m-0.2.1-img-1.3.patch by Hironori Sakamoto to PATCHFILES.
It enables w3m to display image files on X11 terminals.
Merge pkg-plist and pkg-plist.ja.

Added files:
	files/extra-patch-XMakefile
	files/extra-patch-XMakefile.noimg

Removed files:
	files/patch-ae
	pkg-plist.ja
